series_metadata.series_description: Legal documents regarding insurance companies subject to subpoenas, including by-laws, articles, amendments, application of various forms, copies, certificates of authority.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review every 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review every 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Permanent
